goal: The onset-motif line proved the trend regime adds STABLE conditional INFORMATION (interaction MI >0, significant every year 2022-2025). But mutual information is SIGN-BLIND -- it cannot tell apart 'in an up-trend, this candle shape predicts higher returns' (DIRECTIONAL, tradable) from 'this candle shape predicts higher VOLATILITY / downside risk' (sign-blind, NOT directly tradable long). This line answers the binding question the MI verdict could not: is the stable conditional information DIRECTIONAL, MONOTONE, and convertible into a net-of-cost long-only return -- or is it information-only? It decomposes the information (conditional mean/direction, NOT MI) and runs the SIMPLEST possible regime-gated, long-only, cost-aware, cross-sectional backtest. If even the simplest gate can't turn the stable information into money, do NOT build the complex motif model. $0 (reuse candle features + regimes + long_only + ashare_cost; pure measurement, NO new model).
env: Use .venv-xpu. Reuse src/onset/candle_geometry (FEATURE_COLS), src/onset/regimes (trend/vol states + map_states_to_rows), src/onset/long_only (long_only_excess, summarize_excess), src/onset/ashare_cost (round_trip_cost, enterable, net_excess), and results/motif/mi_stability.json (the top stable feature/regime hits). D1 for _fwd_r5.
discipline: Carry ALL prior SIGNs (esp. SIGN-001 gate=runs-correctly; SIGN-D1 cross-period; SIGN-R1 nulls valid+never gated; SIGN-M1 MI biased). SIGN-T1 (new): MI is SIGN-BLIND so it does NOT establish tradability -- directionality is measured by the CONDITIONAL MEAN / sign-hit-rate, monotonicity by the conditional QUANTILE response, and tradability by a net-of-cost, long-only, cross-sectional backtest with date-clustered CIs. A clean 'information-only' (non-tradable) verdict is a VALID, publishable finding and must be recorded, never gated.
acceptanceCriteria: Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic with a KNOWN directional vs sign-blind structure, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed json under results/motif/; findings (incl. an information-only null) recorded, never gated
Every tradability claim uses conditional MEAN/monotonicity/net-of-cost return, never raw MI (SIGN-T1); costs are realistic A-share (SIGN-A1); CIs are date-clustered (SIGN-003)

tasks.title: Information tradability decomposer: directionality + monotonicity
tasks.rationale: Separate DIRECTIONAL information (conditional mean of fwd_r moves with the feature, sign-coherent) from SIGN-BLIND information (feature predicts |fwd_r|/variance but not its sign). Plus a monotonicity score (conditional-mean response across feature quantile buckets) -- monotone => directly tradable, hump/U => not.
acceptanceCriteria: directionality(x, y, z_states) -> per-regime conditional-mean slope + sign-hit-rate of feature about y (NOT MI)
monotonicity(x, y, z_states, q=5) -> per-regime conditional-mean of y across feature quantile buckets + a monotonicity coefficient (e.g. rank corr of bucket index vs bucket mean)
variance_vs_mean(x, y, z_states) -> how much of the dependence is in E[y|x] (directional) vs Var[y|x] (sign-blind)

hermetic: a DIRECTIONAL synthetic (E[y|x] monotone in x, regime flips sign) scores high directionality+monotonicity; a SIGN-BLIND synthetic (Var[y|x] depends on x, E[y|x]=0) scores ~0 directionality but non-zero MI
tasks.notes: SIGN-T1: conditional MEAN, not MI. This is what MI could not see.

tasks.title: Simplest regime-gated long-only signal builder
tasks.rationale: The minimal model: in the activating regime (e.g. trend up), rank stocks cross-sectionally by the candle feature and go long the top-K; out of regime, hold cash/neutral. Reuses long_only_excess + ashare_cost. If THIS can't make money, no graph/point-process model will.
acceptanceCriteria: regime_gated_excess(panel, feature, in_regime, ret, date, k_frac, cost) -> per-date long-only top-K market-excess, zero when out of regime, net of round-trip A-share cost
point-in-time: regime + feature both use only past/known info (SIGN-A1)
hermetic: the gate is non-zero ONLY on in-regime dates and selects the top-K by feature; a constructed directional in-regime edge yields positive net excess
tasks.notes: Depends SGN1. Reuse long_only + ashare_cost; do NOT reimplement cost.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): directional-vs-sign-blind diagnosis of the stable information
tasks.rationale: Apply SGN1 to the MI3 winners (top stable feature x regime hits). Is the stable conditional information DIRECTIONAL and MONOTONE, or sign-blind (variance/risk)?
acceptanceCriteria: for each MI3 top hit: directionality, monotonicity, variance-vs-mean split, per regime and overall
writes results/motif/tradability.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; the directional-vs-sign-blind finding recorded in progress.md
tasks.notes: Depends SGN1. Reads results/motif/mi_stability.json for the hit list.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): simplest regime-gated long-only cost-aware backtest (decisive)
tasks.rationale: THE decisive money test. Regime-gated long-only top-K, net of realistic A-share cost, market-excess, date-clustered bootstrap CI, per-year. Does the stable information convert to net-of-cost return that survives cross-period?
acceptanceCriteria: regime-gated long-only backtest on D1 for the best MI3 feature(s) + trend/vol regime; net annualized excess + date-clustered CI, pooled and per-year (2022-2025)
compare gated vs ungated (always-on) to isolate the regime's contribution
writes results/motif/regime_gate_bt.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; the net-of-cost cross-period finding recorded
tasks.notes: Depends RGT1, TRD1. SIGN-A1 costs, SIGN-D1 cross-period, SIGN-003 clustered CI.

tasks.title: Tradability verdict: TRADABLE vs INFORMATION-ONLY
tasks.rationale: Aggregate TRD1 + TRD2 into the decisive verdict: is the stable conditional information convertible into deployable long-only alpha (=> build the motif model), or is it real-but-information-only (=> do NOT build; at most a risk/timing overlay)?
acceptanceCriteria: verdict TRADABLE only if directional AND monotone AND net-of-cost excess CI>0 in >=2/3 years; else INFORMATION-ONLY (with which dimension failed: sign-blind / non-monotone / eaten-by-cost / non-stationary)
hermetic smoke green; real run + committed
tasks.notes: Depends TRD1, TRD2. The honest bridge from the MI verdict to a deployment decision.
